antipattern.symptom: CI bill explodes; tests randomly fail due to API rate limits; flake rate > 10%.
antipattern.root-cause: Tests call real OpenAI / Anthropic / NIM endpoints in every PR.
antipattern.fix: Mock all LLM clients with `unittest.mock` or `respx`. Reserve live calls for the `--live` red-team marker that runs nightly, not per-PR.

antipattern.symptom: Security suite green; production users complain "my legit message gets blocked"; no test catches it.
antipattern.root-cause: Accuracy suite either missing or has no pass/fail threshold on FP rate.
antipattern.fix: Declare `fp_budget` in the report; assert `false_positive_rate <= fp_budget` in CI; default budget = 0.01.

antipattern.symptom: Payload library has 30 entries dated 2025; new jailbreak techniques pass undetected; red-team report shows "0 issues" while live traffic shows 5/day.
antipattern.root-cause: Payload library is frozen; no monthly refresh; no source from threat-intel feeds.
antipattern.fix: Version payload files (v1.jsonl, v2.jsonl); add monthly task to ingest patterns from OWASP LLM list and from production incident reports.

antipattern.symptom: p99 latency creeps from 200 ms to 800 ms over six releases; no alarm; SLO breach in prod.
antipattern.root-cause: Perf suite runs but produces no stored baseline; comparisons are ad-hoc.
antipattern.fix: Persist `bench.json` baseline per release; CI fails if `p99 > baseline_p99 * 1.2`. Refresh baseline only on explicit approval.
